church.name: AD Niamey 2000
church.desc: Ikilisiyoyin Allah a Nijar. Iyali na bangaskiya inda kowa yake marhabin.

home.title: Marhaba zuwa AD Niamey 2000
home.subtitle: Iyali ne na bangaskiya inda soyayyar Allah ke canza rayuka. Muna maraba da ku da farin ciki don girma tare cikin alheri da sanin Ubangijinmu.

about.title: Game da Mu
about.subtitle: Tarihin mu, manufar mu, bangaskiyar mu.

events.title: Abubuwan Mu
events.subtitle: Ku ci gaba da haɗi zuwa rayuwar ikilisiyar mu.

gallery.title: Hotuna da Bidiyoyi
gallery.subtitle: Ku gano muhimman lokutan rayuwar ikilisiyar mu ta hotuna.

contact.title: Tuntuɓe Mu
contact.subtitle: Za mu yi farin cikin ji daga gare ku.

ministere.title: Ma'aikatan Mu
ministere.subtitle: Ku gano tawagar fastocin mu da sassan mu.

welcome.title: Marhaba a cikin ikilisiyar mu
welcome.text: Mu iyali ne na bangaskiya, da aka haɗa cikin soyayyar Allah, mun sadaukar da kanmu don hidimar al'ummarmu da kuma raba Bisharar Yesu Almasihu. Ko kuna wucewa ne ko kuna neman iyali na ruhaniya, kuna gida a nan.
welcome.text2: Manufar mu ita ce yin almajirai, bauta wa Allah, da kuma hidimar maƙwabcin mu cikin soyayya.

cta.title: Ku haɗe da mu wannan Lahadi
cta.text: Za mu yi farin cikin marhabar da ku a tsakanin mu. Ku zo ku ɗanɗani lokacin bangaskiya, yabo, da zamantakewa.

schedule.title: Lokutan Hidimomin Mu
schedule.subtitle: Ku haɗe da mu don bauta wa Ubangiji da girma cikin Kalmarsa.

testimonials.title: Shaidodi
testimonials.subtitle: Rayuka da aka canza ta wurin ikon Allah.

1.text: Tun da na shiga wannan ikilisiya, rayuwata ta canja sosai. Na sami salama, 'yan'uwa waɗanda suka tallafa mini a lokutan wahala. Godiya ga Allah!
1.author: — 'Yar'uwa Hadiza

2.text: Nazarin Littafi Mai Tsarki na yamma Laraba ya taimake ni in fahimci Kalmar Allah sosai. Ina godiya ga koyarwar ƙwararru da muke samu a nan.
2.author: — Ɗan'uwa Mamane

3.text: Lokacin da na rasa aiki, ikilisiya ta yi addu'a tare da ni kuma ta tallafa mini. Allah ya buɗe kofa fiye da duk abin da nake tsammani. Na gode wa wannan iyali na bangaskiya!
3.author: — Ɗan'uwa Adamou

don.title: Taimaka wa Aikin
don.subtitle: Gudummawar ku tana taimakawa ci gaban Mulkin Allah. Na gode don karimcin ku da amincin ku wajen tallafawa ikilisiya.
don.verse: Allah ya saka muku da albarka mai yawa saboda karimcin ku! 2 Korintiyawa 9:7

page.title: Game da Mu - AD Niamey 2000 | Tarihi, Manufa da Hangen Mu

about.historyText: An kafa ta a shekara ta 2008 a unguwar Yantala ta Niamey, AD Niamey 2000 (Ikilisiyoyin Allah na Nijar) ta fito daga hangen nesa na Fasto Amadou Issoufou da ƙaramin rukunin masu bi masu sha'awar ganin Bisharar Yesu Almasihu ta canza babban birnin Nijar.
about.historyText2: Abin da ya fara a matsayin ƙungiyar addu'a ta mutane 15 yau al'umma ce mai ƙarfi fiye da membobi 120. Ikilisiyar mu ta shahara da himma a koyarwar Littafi Mai Tsarki, yabo, roƙo, da ayyukan zamantakewa ga mabukata.
about.historyText3: Muna da alaƙa da Ikilisiyoyin Allah na Nijar (ADN), ƙungiyar Pentikostal da ke duk yankunan ƙasar. Hangen mu shi ne yin almajirai waɗanda suke yin tasiri ga zamaninsu ta wurin soyayya da ikon Allah.
about.missionText: Shelda Bisharar Yesu Almasihu, yin almajirai, da hidimar al'ummarmu cikin soyayya da tausayi.
about.missionPoint1: Jagorantar rayuka zuwa ga Kristi ta bishara
about.missionPoint2: Horar da almajirai ta koyarwar Kalmar
about.missionPoint3: Hidimar al'ummarmu cikin soyayya da tausayi
about.missionPoint4: Bauta wa Allah cikin ruhu da gaskiya
about.visionText: Ikilisiya inda kowane mutum ya sadu da Allah, ya girma cikin bangaskiya, kuma ya yi tasiri ga zamaninsa ga Kristi.
about.visionPoint2: Ikilisiya da ke girma da yawaita
about.visionPoint3: Ikilisiya da ke yin tasiri ga zamaninta

pastors.subtitle: Mutanen Allah da suka sadaukar da kansu don hidimar garken.

1.name: Fasto Amadou Ousmane
1.bio: Babban faston AD Niamey 2000 tun kafuwarta. Likitan tauhidi, yana da sha'awar koyar da Kalmar da horar da shugabanni.

2.name: Fasto Samuel Tchétché
2.bio: Faston mataimaki. Mai hangen nesa, yana jagorantar ma'aikatan yabo da roƙo.

3.name: Fasto David Yacoubou
3.bio: Faston matasa. Mai himma da kirkire-kirkire, yana jagorantar ma'aikatan matasa.

beliefs.title: Ikinariyar Bangaskiyar Mu
beliefs.subtitle: Tushen Littafi Mai Tsarki wanda bangaskiyar mu ta dogara akai.
beliefs.bibleText: Littafi Mai Tsarki shine Kalmar Allah mai numfashi, babban ikon mu a cikin al'amuran bangaskiya da hali.
beliefs.salutText: Ceto ta wurin alheri ne, ta wurin bangaskiya cikin Yesu Almasihu, Mai shiga tsakani daya tilo tsakanin Allah da mutane.
beliefs.spiritText: Mun yi imani da baptismar Ruhu Mai Tsarki da kyaututtukansa da ke aiki a Ikilisiya a yau.
beliefs.churchText: Ikilisiya ita ce jikin Kristi, al'ummar masu bi da suka haɗa kai cikin bangaskiya, soyayya, da manufa.

senior.name: Fasto Amadou Ousmane
senior.bio1: Babban faston AD Niamey 2000 tun kafuwarta. Likitan tauhidi, yana da sha'awar koyar da Kalmar da horar da shugabanni.
senior.bio2: Ma'aikatarsa tana da alama ta shafewar fastoci mai zurfi da soyayya ta gaskiya ga mutanen Allah.
senior.bio3: Miji da uban yara uku, shi abin koyi ne na bangaskiya da gaskiya ga dukan ikilisiya.

associate.bio: Fasto mataimaki. Mai hangen nesa, yana jagorantar ma'aikatan yabo da roƙo.

youth.bio: Faston matasa tun 2018. Yana kuma jagorantar makarantar Littafi Mai Tsarki ta Laraba.

team.title: Tawagar Fastocin Mu
team.subtitle: Tawagar haɗe-haɗe da bambanta tana hidimar Allah.

departments.title: Sassan Mu
departments.subtitle: Ma'aikata daban-daban don isa ga kowane zamani.

ministry.children.desc: Shiri na musamman don yaran mu tare da koyarwar Littafi Mai Tsarki mai mu'amala.
ministry.youth.desc: Ayyuka masu kuzari don tsara tsara na gaba na shugabanni.
ministry.men.desc: Taro don ƙarfafa maza cikin matsayinsu na shugabannin ruhaniya.
ministry.women.desc: Wuri na ƙarfafawa da girma ga mata na ikilisiya.
ministry.music.desc: Bauta a zuciyar ikilisiyar mu, tare da tawagar mawaƙa da mawaƙa masu sadaukarwa.
ministry.mission.desc: Rabuwar soyayyar Allah ta ayyukan mishan na gida da na duniya.

1.title: Taron Matasa Tsara na Tasiri
1.desc: Babban taron matasa tare da koyarwa masu ƙarfafawa, taron bita, da lokutan yabo.

2.title: Bimbini na Safiya
2.desc: Ku haɗe da mu kowace safiya don lokacin addu'a da bimbini kan Kalmar.

3.title: Baftisma na Al'umma
3.desc: An buɗe rajista don baftisma na gaba a kogin Nijar.

4.title: Daren Yabo
4.desc: Maraice na musamman na yabo da bauta.

contact.title: Rubuta mana
contact.name: Suna
contact.subject: Maudu'i
contact.desc: Kuna da tambaya, buƙatar addu'a, ko kuna son ƙarin bayani? Cika fom ɗin da ke ƙasa.

success.title: An Aika Saƙo!
success.text: An aika saƙonku cikin nasara. Za mu dawo muku da sauri.

prayer.title: Aika Bukatar Addu'a
prayer.subtitle: Ƙungiyar mu ta roƙo za ta yi addu'a a gare ku. Duk buƙatun za su kasance a asirce.
prayer.subject: Nau'in bukata
prayer.name: Sunan ku na farko (ko ba a bayyana ba)
prayer.placeholder: Ku rubuta bukatar addu'ar ku anan...

commit1.title: Addu'a ta yau da kullum
commit1.desc: Ƙungiyar mu tana yin addu'a ga kowace bukata da aka karɓa kowace rana.

commit2.title: Roƙo na Juma'a
commit2.desc: Kowace Juma'a, taron roƙon mu yana ɗaukar bukatun ku a gaban kursiyin Allah.

commit3.title: Sirrin Cikakken
commit3.desc: Bukatun ku suna kasancewa a asirce tsakanin ku da ƙungiyar addu'ar mu.

prayer.verse: "Kada ku damu da kome, amma a kowane hali, ta wurin addu'a da roƙo, tare da godiya, ku sanar da bukatun ku ga Allah."

page.title: Ma'aikatan Mu - AD Niamey 2000 | Fastoci da Tawaga
404 - Ba a Samo Shafi ba | AD Niamey 2000

_404.title: Shafi ba a samo ba
_404.text: Yi haƙuri, shafin da kuke nema bai wanzu ba ko kuma an motsa shi.

common.cookieBanner: Wannan shafi yana amfani da kukis don inganta kwarewar ku.
